query:
WITH target AS (
            SELECT path FROM toc_nodes WHERE id = $2 AND book_id = $1
        )
        SELECT anc.source_id AS "source_id!"
        FROM toc_nodes anc, target
        WHERE anc.book_id = $1
          AND anc.path @> target.path
          AND anc.source_id IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY anc.depth DESC
        LIMIT 1
